notes: Made-in-USA manual screen presses and dryers. V-2000HD is fully expandable 1-10 stations/colours; the manual/entry anchor of the pilot.
The dominant automatic garment screen-press maker. Two machines here: Sportsman EX (value automatic) and Challenger III (flagship oversize). Servo indexers, electric printheads.
European high-end automatic garment presses. NEXT uses chain-drive + AC servo, up to 1,200 prints/hr; modular colour/pallet scaling. Hybrid screen+digital options.
